title: Command-Line Reference
description: Complete reference for all DemiEngine command-line options and flags

sections.title: Command-Line Overview
sections.content: DemiEngine provides a comprehensive command-line interface for running programs, executing tests, and compiling to native executables.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.content:
```bash
demi-engine [options] [file]

# Run hex program
./bin/demi-engine -H program.hex

# Assemble and run
./bin/demi-engine -A program.asm

# Run tests
./bin/demi-engine -t
```

sections.title: Help and Information
sections.content:
```bash
--help, -h              Show help information and exit

# Usage
./bin/demi-engine --help
./bin/demi-engine -h
```

sections.title: Execution Modes
sections.content:
**Hex Mode:**
```bash
--hex FILE, -H FILE     Run hex file
./bin/demi-engine -H program.hex
```

**Assembly Mode:**
```bash
--assembly FILE, -A FILE    Assemble and run .asm file
./bin/demi-engine -A program.asm
```

**Compile Mode:**
```bash
--compile [NAME], -o [NAME]    Compile to standalone executable
./bin/demi-engine -o myapp program.hex
./bin/demi-engine -o program.asm  # Auto-named
```

sections.title: Testing Modes
sections.content:
**All Tests:**
```bash
--test [FILE], -t [FILE]       Run all tests or specific file
./bin/demi-engine -t
./bin/demi-engine -t my_test.asm
```

**Unit Tests:**
```bash
--unit-test [FILE], -ut [FILE]    Run unit tests (fastest)
./bin/demi-engine -ut
```

**Integration Tests:**
```bash
--integration-test [FILE], -it [FILE]    Run integration tests
./bin/demi-engine -it
```

**Assembly Tests:**
```bash
--assembly-test [FILE], -at [FILE]    Run assembly tests
./bin/demi-engine -at
./bin/demi-engine -at tests/asm/test_arithmetic.asm
```

**Quiet Mode:**
```bash
--assembly-test-quiet [FILE], -atq [FILE]    Minimal output
./bin/demi-engine -atq
```

sections.title: Test Output Filtering
sections.content:
Control which test results are displayed:

```bash
--show=MODE            Filter test output

# Show all tests (default)
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=all

# Show only failed tests
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=fails
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=fail

# Show only passed tests
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=success
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=pass
```

**Note:** All tests still run; filtering only affects output. Summary statistics always show complete results.

sections.title: Debug Options
sections.content:
**Debug Mode:**
```bash
--debug, -d            Enable detailed debug logging
./bin/demi-engine -d -H program.hex
```

**Verbose Output:**
```bash
--verbose, -v          Show informational messages
./bin/demi-engine -v -H program.hex

# Disable verbose (useful when default is on)
./bin/demi-engine --verbose=false -H program.hex
```

**Extended Registers:**
```bash
--extended-registers, -er    Show all 134 registers
./bin/demi-engine -er -H program.hex
```

**Memory Dump:**
```bash
--memdump, -m          Print memory dump after execution
./bin/demi-engine -m -H program.hex
```

**Debug File:**
```bash
--debug-file FILE, -f FILE    Write debug output to file
./bin/demi-engine -d -f debug.log -H program.hex
```

sections.title: Combining Flags
sections.content:
Multiple flags can be combined:

```bash
# Debug with extended registers
./bin/demi-engine -d -er -H program.hex

# Verbose testing with failure filter
./bin/demi-engine -v -at --show=fails

# Compile with debug output
./bin/demi-engine -d -o myapp program.hex

# Assembly test with memory dump
./bin/demi-engine -m -A program.asm
```

sections.title: Common Use Cases
sections.content:
**Quick Test Run:**
```bash
make test
# or
./bin/demi-engine -t
```

**Debug Failing Test:**
```bash
./bin/demi-engine -d -at tests/asm/failing_test.asm
```

**Check Only Failures:**
```bash
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=fails
```

**Compile Production Binary:**
```bash
./bin/demi-engine -o myapp program.asm
./myapp  # Run standalone
```

**Development Iteration:**
```bash
# Fast unit test loop
./bin/demi-engine -ut

# Test specific assembly file
./bin/demi-engine -at tests/asm/new_feature.asm

# Full test before commit
./bin/demi-engine -t
```

**Debugging Program:**
```bash
# Full debug with all registers
./bin/demi-engine -d -er -m -H program.hex

# Debug to file
./bin/demi-engine -d -f debug.log -A program.asm
```

sections.title: Exit Codes
sections.content:
DemiEngine returns standard exit codes:

- **0**: Success (all tests passed, program executed successfully)
- **1**: Error (test failures, runtime errors, invalid arguments)

Useful for scripting:

```bash
if ./bin/demi-engine -t; then
    echo "All tests passed!"
    git commit -m "Tests passing"
else
    echo "Tests failed!"
    exit 1
fi
```

sections.title: Performance Tips
sections.content:
**Fast Development Cycle:**
```bash
# Use unit tests for quick feedback (1-2s)
./bin/demi-engine -ut
```

**Parallel Test Execution:**
```bash
# In separate terminals or CI
./bin/demi-engine -ut &
./bin/demi-engine -it &
./bin/demi-engine -at &
wait
```

**Filtered Output:**
```bash
# Only see what matters
./bin/demi-engine -at --show=fails 2>&1 | grep -A 5 "Test:"
```

sections.title: Troubleshooting Commands
sections.content:
**Check Installation:**
```bash
./bin/demi-engine --help
```

**Verify Tests Work:**
```bash
./bin/demi-engine -ut
```

**Debug Build Issues:**
```bash
make clean
make
./bin/demi-engine -ut
```

**Check Specific Test:**
```bash
./bin/demi-engine -d -at tests/asm/failing_test.asm
```

**Memory Issues:**
```bash
./bin/demi-engine -d -m -er -H program.hex 2>&1 | less
```
